PI

Zehua Xu

Education:

  • (2016) B.S. Nucleaer Technology and Computing Science, Wuhan University
  • (2021) Ph.D. Physics, Peking University

Work Experience:

  • 2021–2024: Postdoc, Laboratoire de Physique de Clermont Auvergne, Centre national de la recherche scientifique(CNRS)
  • 2024–2026: Senior Research Fellow, European Organization for Nuclear Research (CERN)
  • 2026–NOW: Professor of Physics, University of Science and Technology of China (USTC)
